ddls:
CREATE TABLE "texts" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the text */,
  "text_content" TEXT /* Actual text content */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the text (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata as a JSON object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texts_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., movie review, social media, customer feedback) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source if web-based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity of the sentiment (e.g., 0.5, -0.2) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "negations" (
  "negation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each negation detection result */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being analyzed */,
  "negation_type" TEXT /* Type of negation (e.g., affix, synonym, contextual) */,
  "cue" TEXT /* Cue that indicates the negation */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the negation detection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the negation detection was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the negation detection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("negation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_negations_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cues" (
  "cue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cue */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being analyzed */,
  "cue_type" TEXT /* Type of cue (e.g., sentiment, emotion) */,
  "cue_content" TEXT /* Actual cue content */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the cue detection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cue detection was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cue detection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cues_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "importance" (
  "importance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each importance analysis result */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being analyzed */,
  "phrase" TEXT /* Phrase or sentence being evaluated */,
  "importance_level" REAL /* Importance level (e.g., 0.8, 0.4) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the importance analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the importance analysis was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the importance analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("importance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_importance_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judgments" (
  "judgment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judgment analysis result */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being analyzed */,
  "judgment_type" TEXT /* Type of judgment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level (e.g., 0.8, 0.4) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the judgment analysis was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the judgment analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judgment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judgments_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_content" TEXT /* Actual feedback content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., author, date) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_metadata_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text */,
  "dev_index" INTEGER /* Dev index value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_mapping_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)
